description_long: This is a circular ring with a smooth, metallic finish, likely made of polished gold or bronze. Attached to the top of the ring is a small, round, greenish gem or bead, from which two thin wires extend upward to support a rectangular, translucent sign. The sign displays the text 'I <3 YOU' in a digital-style font, with the message visible from both the front and back. The ring itself is simple and unadorned, emphasizing the central gem and the attached sign as focal points. The overall design is modern and playful, combining classic jewelry elements with a contemporary, message-bearing motif. The object appears lightweight and is likely intended as a novelty or statement piece.
description: A polished metallic ring with a small green gem and a suspended translucent sign reading 'I <3 YOU'. The design is modern and playful, blending classic jewelry with a message display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ring, green gem, and the sign clearly displaying 'I <3 YOU'.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical thickness of the ring and the vertical alignment of the sign, with the gem barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the ring and the sign with the text mirrored as 'UOY <3 I'.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the ring's profile and the vertical wires.
